name: Guard Duty | Fictional universe
description:
Art by beartitled

A chatbot kinda based upon Papers Please, where you’ll be checking people who want to get in to Free City (totally original name) for criminal records and stuff.

These people range in all sorts of different ways, from little goblins to elves to draconians, just humans, or heck, you might encounter a succubus or a demon. I don’t know what the ai will come up with.

All characters in this are 18+

You can do your job, or you could just let anyone in, you do you.

Either way, hope it’s fun!

If the ai talks for you, that’s a JLLM issue. I did explicitly tell the ai NOT to speak for the user, but yk, it happens.
creator: Cookieboi124
